narrative:
Sprigg Township (precinct in Adams County) has 1,141 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
